title: Deriving RK4 from Scratch
description: A walkthrough of the Runge-Kutta family of ODE integrators, building intuition from Euler's method up to classical RK4.

title: Mesh Quality Metrics That Actually Matter
description: Practical notes on skewness, aspect ratio, and orthogonality — when each matters and how to diagnose bad meshes before running.

title: Reynolds Averaging and the Closure Problem
description: Why RANS works, why it fails, and what the closure problem actually is — written for someone who's used k-ε but never derived it.
